artifact: RCA report: inconclusive. The status-D district concentration query was not executed, so no top-three districts or feature comparison is claimed. The intended RCA ranks districts by count of running-in-debt loans, compares the top three to the bottom three, and reports whether unemployment A13, crime A16, or salary A11 differ descriptively from low-D districts.

sql.rank_districts: WITH district_d AS (SELECT d.district_id, d."A2" AS district, d."A3" AS region, CAST(d."A11" AS numeric) AS avg_salary, CAST(d."A13" AS numeric) AS unemployment_1996, CAST(d."A16" AS numeric) AS crime_rate, COUNT(l.loan_id) FILTER (WHERE l.status='D') AS status_d_count FROM district d LEFT JOIN account a ON a.district_id=d.district_id LEFT JOIN loan l ON l.account_id=a.account_id GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6), ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY status_d_count DESC, district_id) AS high_rank, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY status_d_count ASC, district_id) AS low_rank FROM district_d) SELECT CASE WHEN high_rank<=3 THEN 'top_3_D' WHEN low_rank<=3 THEN 'bottom_3_D' END AS comparison_group, * FROM ranked WHERE high_rank<=3 OR low_rank<=3 ORDER BY comparison_group DESC, status_d_count DESC;
sql.feature_summary: WITH district_d AS (SELECT d.district_id, CAST(d."A11" AS numeric) AS avg_salary, CAST(d."A13" AS numeric) AS unemployment_1996, CAST(d."A16" AS numeric) AS crime_rate, COUNT(l.loan_id) FILTER (WHERE l.status='D') AS status_d_count FROM district d LEFT JOIN account a ON a.district_id=d.district_id LEFT JOIN loan l ON l.account_id=a.account_id GROUP BY 1,2,3,4), ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY status_d_count DESC, district_id) AS high_rank, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY status_d_count ASC, district_id) AS low_rank FROM district_d) SELECT CASE WHEN high_rank<=3 THEN 'top_3_D' WHEN low_rank<=3 THEN 'bottom_3_D' ELSE 'middle' END AS group_name, COUNT(*) AS districts, AVG(status_d_count) AS avg_status_d_count, AVG(avg_salary) AS avg_salary, AVG(unemployment_1996) AS avg_unemployment_1996, AVG(crime_rate) AS avg_crime_rate FROM ranked GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
